_README: Add YOUR critical apps below, set 'enabled': true, then run the installer. Healer keeps each enabled service alive: if its port stops listening, its health check fails, or its process dies, Healer restarts it (guarded against restart-loops). Set 'recover': false to only MONITOR + alert (e.g. a remote device you cannot restart). Everything is OFF by default so a fresh install does nothing until you configure it.

services._example: A local web/app server on a port. EDIT, then set enabled:true. 'argv' = how to start it, 'cwd' = its folder.
services.name: my-app

services._example2: A port-less background process watched by name (ffmpeg, a python worker...). Use port:0 + proc_match.
services.name: my-worker

services._example3: A remote device (camera / DB) — MONITOR + alert only (cannot restart hardware). Set enabled:true + its IP.
services.name: remote-device
